    N

    NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    NetUtils - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils
    The NetUtils class provides utility methods for network-related operations, such as checking for active network interfaces, retrieving the client's IP address from an HttpExchange object, obtaining the local IP address of the host, and fetching the public IP address using an external service.
    NewOrderGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    Modern new order GUI with improved visual design and user experience.
    NewOrderGUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.NewOrderGUI
    Initializes the NewOrderGUI, sets up the layout, components, and event listeners.
    NEXT - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    NO - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    Note - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes
    Simple domain model for a personal note.
    Note(String, String, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Note
    Creates a new note instance.
    NotesGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    Notes manager window for viewing, creating, and updating personal notes.
    NotesGUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.NotesGUI
    Initializes the NotesGUI window, sets up the layout, components, and event handlers.
    NotesManager - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    The NotesManager class is responsible for managing notes in the LagerSystem application.
